title: Notification No.28/2014-Cus(NT), dated 7.4.2014
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 28/ 2014-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated 7th April, 2014 S.O…….. (E). – In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- (i) the Additional Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi; and (ii) the Assistant/Deputy Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Kanakapura, Jaipur, Rajasthan, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s Suncity Electronics, 5/51, WEA, Ajmal Khan Road, Karol Bagh, New Delhi issued vide, DRI F.No.23/93/2012-DZU(Sun)/650 to 653, dated the 6th February, 2014 by the Additional Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi Zonal Unit, New Delhi. [F.No. 437/19/2014-Cus.IV] (R.P.Singh) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
